summary: Phase 5 REJECT: Commit 1f8c9ca archived all pipeline modules (cleaning.py, qa_qc.py, validation.py, imputation.py, resampling.py, manifest.py, normalized_loader.py, fwi.py, materialize_resampled.py) from src/ to docs/archive/v1-pipeline/. This destroyed the pipeline entry point and all phase 3+ deliverables. The test suite has 9 collection errors (ModuleNotFoundError) and 10 assertion failures. Adapters (phase 1-2) are unaffected and still passing. Ralph must rebuild cleaning.py and qa_qc.py from the phase 5 spec before any progress can be made.
